Title: Create new loyalty program
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; Loyalty module accessible at #!/workspace/loyalty
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[BLADE] loyalty programs list blade is visible
[ACT] click 'Add' button in toolbar
[BLADE] new loyalty program detail blade opens
[ACT] fill 'Name': 'Test Loyalty Program'
[ACT] select 'Store': @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) from dropdown
[ACT] fill 'Priority': 1
[ACT] toggle 'Active' to ON
[ACT] fill 'Start date' to today's date
[SAVE] click 'Save'
Assertions:
[TOAST] success notification displayed
[FORM] program appears in loyalty programs list
[FORM] 'Name' field shows 'Test Loyalty Program'
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during save
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on save request
Cleanup: Delete the created test loyalty program after test

Title: View loyalty program details
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; at least one loyalty program exists
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[GRID] locate any existing program in list
[ACT] click on program row
[BLADE] program detail blade opens
Assertions:
[FORM] fields displayed: Active toggle; Priority; Name; Localized names; Store; Start date; End date
[BLADE] Conditions section visible
[BLADE] Rewards section visible

Title: Edit existing loyalty program
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; at least one loyalty program exists
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] click on existing program
[BLADE] detail blade opens
[ACT] fill 'Name': 'Updated Program Name'
[ACT] fill 'Priority': 10
[ACT] toggle 'Active' to opposite state
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close blade
[ACT] click the program again
[BLADE] detail blade reopens
Assertions:
[FORM] 'Name' shows 'Updated Program Name'
[FORM] 'Priority' shows 10
[FORM] 'Active' reflects toggled state
Cleanup: Restore original name and priority; toggle Active back

Title: Delete loyalty program
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; a test loyalty program exists that can be deleted
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] select test loyalty program in list
[ACT] click 'Delete' button in toolbar
[WAIT] confirmation dialog appears
[ACT] click 'Yes' in dialog
Assertions:
[BLADE] program removed from list
[GRID] deleted program no longer appears in search results
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on delete request

Title: Add single condition to program
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; a loyalty program is open for editing
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open existing program or create new one
[BLADE] program detail blade visible
[ACT] click 'Add condition' in Conditions section
[WAIT] 3-group condition menu appears (Shopper profile / Order conditions / Special conditions)
[ACT] click 'Order conditions' group to expand
[ACT] click 'Order status is...' condition row
[WAIT] condition row added with status selector
[ACT] click 'Add' inline link next to the status selector
[ACT] select 'Completed' from the status picker
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close and reopen program
Assertions:
[FORM] condition 'Order status' visible in conditions list with value 'Completed'
[FORM] condition persisted after reopen

Title: Add multiple conditions to program
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; a loyalty program is open for editing
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open existing program
[ACT] click 'Add condition'; expand 'Order conditions' group; click 'Order status is...'; click 'Add' link; select 'Completed'
[ACT] click 'Add condition' again; expand 'Order conditions' group; click 'Order status is...'; click 'Add' link; select 'Pending'
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close and reopen program
Assertions:
[FORM] both conditions visible in conditions section
[FORM] logical operator 'If any of the following criteria' applies to all

Title: Remove condition from program
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; loyalty program with at least one condition configured
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open program with existing condition
[ACT] click delete/remove icon on condition row
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close and reopen program
Assertions:
[FORM] removed condition no longer shows in conditions list
[FORM] other conditions (if any) unaffected

Title: Condition with different order statuses
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; loyalty program open for editing
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open program
[ACT] click 'Add condition'; expand 'Order conditions'; click 'Order status is...'; click 'Add' link; select 'Completed'; click 'Save' and verify
[ACT] click 'Add' link on existing condition row; select a different status (e.g. 'New'); click 'Save' and verify
Assertions:
[FORM] updated status reflected after each save
[FORM] status picker exposes all available order statuses (at minimum: ReadyForPickup; Custom; Cancelled; New; Completed; Pending; Payment required)

Title: Set fixed points reward
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; loyalty program open for editing
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open existing program
[ACT] click 'Add reward' in Rewards section
[ACT] select reward type 'Earn fixed amount of points per order' from type dropdown
[ACT] fill points value: 5.00
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close and reopen program
Assertions:
[FORM] reward entry visible in Rewards section showing value 5.00 and type 'Earn fixed amount of points per order'
[FORM] reward persists after reopen

Title: Modify reward amount
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; loyalty program with reward configured (5.00 fixed points)
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open program with existing reward
[ACT] change points value from 5.00 to 15.50
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close and reopen program
Assertions: [FORM] reward shows updated value 15.50
Cleanup: Restore original value or remove reward

Title: Add multiple rewards to program
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; loyalty program open for editing
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open program
[ACT] click 'Add reward'; select 'Earn fixed amount of points per order'; fill value 5.00
[ACT] click 'Add reward'; select 'Earn % of order value as points'; fill percentage value 10.00
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close and reopen program
Assertions:
[FORM] both reward entries visible in Rewards section with their respective types and values
[FORM] all rewards persist after reopen

Title: Toggle program active/inactive
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; a loyalty program exists
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open loyalty program; note current 'Active' toggle state
[ACT] toggle 'Active' to OFF
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close blade; reopen the same program
[BLADE] detail blade reopens
[FORM] verify 'Active' toggle is OFF
[ACT] toggle 'Active' back to ON
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close blade; reopen the same program
Assertions:
[FORM] 'Active' toggle persists OFF state after first save+reopen
[FORM] 'Active' toggle persists ON state after second save+reopen
[FORM] no data loss (Name; Priority unchanged) during toggle cycle

Title: Start and end date scheduling
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; loyalty program open for editing
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open loyalty program
[ACT] set 'Start date' to a future date (tomorrow)
[ACT] set 'End date' to a date after start date (next month)
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close and reopen program
Assertions:
[FORM] both Start date and End date persist correctly
[FORM] dates displayed in correct format

Title: Priority value persists after save
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; at least two loyalty programs exist
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open first program; set Priority to 1; click 'Save'; close blade; reopen first program
[FORM] verify Priority shows 1
[ACT] open second program; set Priority to 2; click 'Save'; close blade; reopen second program
[FORM] verify Priority shows 2
Assertions:
[FORM] Priority value '1' persists on first program after save+reopen
[FORM] Priority value '2' persists on second program after save+reopen

Title: Add localized name for program
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; loyalty program open for editing
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open loyalty program
[ACT] navigate to Localized names section
[ACT] add localized name for es-ES: 'Programa de Lealtad'
[ACT] add localized name for pl-PL: 'Program Lojalnosciowy'
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[ACT] close and reopen program
Assertions:
[FORM] es-ES localized name 'Programa de Lealtad' persists
[FORM] pl-PL localized name 'Program Lojalnosciowy' persists

Title: Verify store-configured language options available
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; loyalty program open for editing
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open loyalty program
[ACT] navigate to Localized names section
[ACT] expand language selection dropdown
Assertions:
[FORM] all store-configured languages appear in the dropdown (language list is store-driven; count and codes depend on store configuration — on @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) verify at minimum: en-US; de-DE; fr-FR; es-ES; pl-PL; it-IT; pt-PT; ja-JP; zh-CN; ru-RU)
[FORM] no duplicate language entries

Title: Create program without required name
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; Loyalty module accessible
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] click 'Add' button
[BLADE] new program blade opens
[ACT] leave 'Name' field empty
[ACT] fill Store; Priority; dates
[SAVE] click 'Save'
Assertions:
[TOAST] validation error displayed — Name is required
[FORM] program NOT saved
[GRID] no empty-named program in list

Title: Set negative points value for reward
Preconditions: Admin user logged in; loyalty program open for editing
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/loyalty
[ACT] open loyalty program
[ACT] click 'Add reward'; select 'Earn fixed amount of points per order'
[ACT] fill points value: -5.00
[SAVE] click 'Save'
Assertions:
[TOAST] validation error — negative points not allowed OR input field prevents negative value entry
[FORM] negative points reward NOT saved

Title: Admin SPA — Configure loyalty settings on Store blade (happy path)
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ADMIN]
Admin user logged in with loyalty:update permission; Loyalty module installed; store @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) exists in Admin SPA
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/stores
[BLADE] Stores list blade visible
[ACT] click on store @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) in grid
[BLADE] Store detail blade opens
[WAIT] blade fully loaded; widgets visible
[ACT] scroll to and click 'Loyalty settings' widget (lowercase s)
[BLADE] 'loyalty-setting-details' blade opens
[ACT] toggle 'Enable Loyalty' to ON
[ACT] click 'Loyalty Mode' dropdown
[ACT] select 'Mixed Cart'
[ACT] click 'Loyalty Currency' dropdown; select @td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code) from the store currencies list
[SAVE] click 'Save'
[BLADE] blade closes or shows success
[ACT] reopen 'Loyalty settings' widget on store blade
Assertions:
[TOAST] success notification after save
[FORM] 'Enable Loyalty' toggle shows ON after reopen
[FORM] 'Loyalty Mode' shows 'Mixed Cart' after reopen
[FORM] 'Loyalty Currency' shows @td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code) after reopen
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/loyalty-setting/store/@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) returns HTTP 200
[API] response body loyaltyEnabled=true; loyaltyMode='Mixed Cart'; loyaltyCurrency=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code) (extra fields such as loyaltyRoute are tolerated)
[CONSOLE] no JS errors in Admin SPA
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s; blade fails to open; save toast shows error; reopen shows stale values
Cleanup: Restore original loyalty settings via PUT {{BACK_URL}}/api/loyalty-setting

Title: Mode dropdown shows exactly the four allowed values
Preconditions: state from LOY-019 (Admin logged in; Store blade open; Loyalty Settings blade open)
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/#!/workspace/stores
[ACT] open store @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
[ACT] open 'Loyalty Settings' widget
[BLADE] 'loyalty-setting-details' blade opens
[ACT] click 'Loyalty Mode' dropdown
[WAIT] dropdown options rendered
Assertions:
[FORM] dropdown shows exactly 4 options: 'Loyalty Store'; 'Mixed Cart'; 'Coupon Redemption'; 'Payment Method'
[FORM] no extra or missing options beyond the 4 AllowedValues
Failure_Signals: Dropdown fails to open; spinner visible >3s

Title: API GET returns configured loyalty settings for store
Preconditions: Loyalty settings for store @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) are configured: loyaltyEnabled=true; loyaltyMode='Mixed Cart'; loyaltyCurrency=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code). If not yet configured; run the PUT from LOY-022 pattern first (FIXTURE-SEEDING).
Steps:
[AUTH] obtain admin Bearer token via POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token (grant_type=password; username={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}; password={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}})
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/loyalty-setting/store/@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) with Authorization: Bearer <token>
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 200
[BODY] storeId == @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
[BODY] loyaltyEnabled == true
[BODY] loyaltyMode == 'Mixed Cart'
[BODY] loyaltyCurrency == @td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)
[BODY] additional fields (e.g. loyaltyRoute) may be present — tolerated; do NOT assert them absent
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] values match what was set in Admin SPA (cross-reference LOY-019)
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: HTTP 4xx/5xx; storeId missing from response; loyaltyEnabled not present

Title: API PUT updates loyalty settings — round-trip verification
Preconditions: Admin Bearer token obtainable; store @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) exists
Assertions:
[STATUS] PUT returns HTTP 204 No Content
[BODY] GET response loyaltyMode == 'Loyalty Store'
[BODY] GET response loyaltyEnabled == true
[BODY] GET response loyaltyCurrency == @td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)
[BODY] additional fields (e.g. loyaltyRoute) may be present — tolerated
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] Admin SPA Loyalty Settings blade reflects 'Loyalty Store' after reload
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on PUT or GET
Failure_Signals: PUT returns non-204; GET after PUT still shows old mode; 500 error
Cleanup: Restore mode to 'Mixed Cart' via PUT after test

Title: API PUT without loyalty:update permission returns 403
Preconditions: A storefront user token exists (user lacks loyalty:update platform permission)
Steps:
[AUTH] obtain token for user WITHOUT loyalty:update permission (e.g. storefront user via {{USER_EMAIL}}/{{USER_PASSWORD}})
[HTTP] PUT {{BACK_URL}}/api/loyalty-setting with body: {storeId: @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id); loyaltyEnabled: false; loyaltyMode: 'Coupon Redemption'; loyaltyCurrency: @td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)}
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 403 Forbidden
[BODY] error or empty body (NOT 204)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] subsequent GET still returns original values — settings NOT changed
[NETWORK] no 500 error
Failure_Signals: HTTP 200 returned (permission bypass); 500 error instead of 403

Title: API GET with unknown storeId returns null or empty
Preconditions: Admin Bearer token obtainable
Steps:
[AUTH] obtain admin Bearer token
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/loyalty-setting/store/NON_EXISTENT_STORE_XYZ_99999
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 200
[BODY] response is null or empty object (NOT a 404 or 500)

Title: Settings propagate to storefront xAPI store query
Preconditions: Loyalty settings saved: Enable=true; Mode=Mixed Cart; Currency=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code) for store @td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) (established by LOY-019)
Steps:
[AUTH] obtain Bearer token (storefront user or anonymous)
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/graphql body: {"query": "{ store(storeId: \"@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)\", cultureName: \"{{CULTURE_NAME}}\") { settings { modules { moduleId settings { name value } } } } }"}
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 200
[BODY] response contains module with moduleId='VirtoCommerce.Loyalty'
[BODY] within that module settings[name='Loyalty.Enable'] value == true
[BODY] within that module settings[name='Loyalty.Mode'] value == 'Mixed Cart'
[BODY] within that module settings[name='Loyalty.Currency'] value == @td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] errors[] is empty (HTTP 200 does NOT guarantee xAPI success)
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on /graphql
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; module 'VirtoCommerce.Loyalty' absent from modules array; currency value empty
